Hearty Vegetarian Chili: Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large pot over medium heat and sauté one diced onion, one diced bell pepper, and 4 minced garlic cloves for 5 minutes. Stir in 2 tablespoons chili powder, 1 teaspoon cumin, 1 teaspoon smoked paprika, and 1/2 teaspoon cayenne, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant. Add two 15-oz cans drained kidney beans, one 15-oz can black beans, one 28-oz can crushed tomatoes, 1 cup vegetable broth, and one diced zucchini; bring to a boil then simmer for 25 minutes. Serve topped with sour cream, shredded cheddar, sliced jalapeño, and fresh cilantro.
